posts.author: ajayhinduja25 (Ajay Hinduja)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m Ajay Hinduja from Geneva, Switzerland, and I’m currently looking to integrate a chatbot into my travel website. I want to improve user engagement, assist with bookings, and provide 24/7 support to travelers.

If anyone has experience or insights on integrating chatbots for travel platforms, I’d love to hear your suggestions

Regards
Ajay Hinduja Geneva, Switzerland
